skills.title: Opening Skill
skills.description: While on the offensive, there is a 50% chance to apply 121.7% Ignition effect to each enemy unit for 1 turn. The base damage of Ignition is equal to the attack of the unit currently in the first slot, and it prioritizes the consumption of the Vulnerable effect applied by this skill.

exclusiveSkill.description: Improve 914's skill effect by 61% (without increasing the chance of triggering Ignition)

bio: Agent 914 is a spy working for the Faceless. The Faceless is excellent at disguising, so they also call them the agents with "Thousand Faces". It is said that their code name refers to the number of faces they have worn. Well, you may have run into one of those Faceless agents, if you are an important person. Like all the other Faceless agents, we barely know anything about this 914. Rumor has it that this organization is supported by the Freedom League, but somehow others are convinced that they work for the Dark Empire.

bio: Abad, as part of the Free Alliance Air Force, genuinely hoped to defend his nation's skies. He aimed to soar through the blue skies of his hometown, once overshadowed by the Dark Legion. However, this was no easy feat. Despite attending the national aviation academy, only stunt planes were available for training due to equipment shortages. This experience honed his impressive aerial combat skills.

bio: Ada Wong, the unpredictable spy. She moves in shadows, impossible to trace. No one knows what drives her or where her true loyalties lie. Even her real name remains a mystery. The only thing we know for sure is that she's highly skilled, decisive, and committed to her mission.

skills.title: Rage Skill
skills.description: Upon releasing the rage skill, consuming 7 Rage points, it triggers 4-10 skill attacks, each randomly dealing 40.1% damage to 1 enemy unit. If your Naval units trigger this skill, it applies 53.7% Debilitation to the hit targets, lasting for 1 turn.

bio: Akatora was not the name his family gave him. He was born and brought up in a wealthy family, but he was not interested in inheriting the family business at all, so he left. One day he went to an Izakaya and met an old man. He had a pleasant chat with this old pal and he even paid off the old man's bill. In return, the old man gave him a sword study guide "Akazuna's Hidden Secret" and the Japanese sword "Tora (the Tiger)". It wasn't until then he realized that this old man in front of him was a Kendo master, who devoted his life to the art of the sword. He named himself after his master, and started to explore the secret of Kendo. Then the war came, Akatora resolutely joined the Freedom League. Although his sword skill is not as good as his master, Akatora's family has been secretly helping him, and made him a powerful armor - whenever the machine detects an extreme situation, a mysterious mech would show up...

bio: Alex earned a lot of respect for bringing freedom back behind enemy lines and the Freedom League finally entrusted him to supervise the region's revitalization and reconstruction. Alex, who is not afraid to take risks, often wanders the city in pursuit of knowledge. Alex, though, remains on the empire's most wanted list and the web of ties in the area makes him a target.

bio: To protect the ship her brother left her, Alvida spurned Katrina's offer and struck a deal with the Dark Empire. On their missions, she walked a fine line—doing just enough to get by while taking as many supplies as she could. But nothing comes for free. When the Imperial Navy conscripted her for the front lines, Alvida seized the chance to desert. Fate, however, had other plans. The port where she docked was a crucial point in the Allied forces' great retreat. In the ensuing chase, she saved countless lives, but her ship was so badly damaged it could barely stay afloat. Now, determined to find the best shipwright in the world, Alvida has decided to join the Navy and seek help from her old friend, Katrina.

skills.title: Preparation Skill

exclusiveSkill.description: Increase the daily maximum limit of obtaining chests for Amalia's domestic skill by 60.

bio: Amalia was born on an archeological site, her parents were well-known archaeologists. Just like her family, Amalia was also fascinated by Archaeology. In her world, the treasures and antiquities are fresh and alive, and she can hear the call of the treasure, so she can find all these relics and monuments, and strange secrets as well. Now she devotes herself to these strange secrets. She works for those who can invest in her research. She is willing to cooperate with the troops to obtain more information and returns.

bio: A kind and loyal Autobot to her friends, Arcee is also a skilled and lethal warrior to her enemies. Arcee's intelligence, quick wit and coolness under fire make her a valued member of the Autobot cause. Arcee converts into a pink futuristic sports car in Top War.

skills.title: Preparation Skill

bio: Harris has been at the center of debates over bombs and their effects on civilian victims. He didn't care about the bombardment until he heard that his nephew had also been killed by the Freedom League. He's still making goals and getting things done, but he can feel the burden mounting in his chest.

bio:
Astrid is the self-assured, competitive champion of the Dragon Races and Hiccup’s longtime girlfriend. Beautiful despite herself, she’s tough and rational, providing Hiccup with a blunt voice of reason while remaining his most outspoken supporter.
A strong sense of duty defines Astrid to the core. She will always do what must be done without regard for herself. So when trouble threatens the people and dragons she loves, Astrid stops at nothing to defend them, even though it means going rogue and defying Stoick’s orders.

bio: Aya is the daughter of the great chief of an ancient tribe. To fight the Dark Empire, the Freedom League destroyed and invaded Aya's homeland. "The Freedom League is no better than the Dark Empire!". She will never forgive the League that destroyed her home, and the Empire that stole the Sacred Item. So fearlessly, she started her own journey of revenge to fight back.

bio: Ahenarbe is an organization empowered and entrusted by the Dark Legion with the task of investigating anomalous objects, entities, and phenomena. In the past Astrology received widespread public interest and was not fully understood. The Ahenarbe were instructed to abduct and detain a number of astrologers and soothsayers with the intention of performing numerous experiments on them. Bailos' parents and little brother were among these captured astrologers. Bailos joined the Freedom league to find her family and bring an end to Ahenarbe.

bio: Barbie, the renowned engineer with flowing blonde hair had always excelled in her field. Her true calling lay beyond the technicalities of her profession, she longed to take to the skies and engage in heart-pounding aerial combat like her idol, Nadia the Skylark. As the Air Force expanded its strategic reach and demand for skilled pilots rose, Barbie saw her chance to fulfill her dream.

bio: Bassel is arbitrary, violent and absurd, but these characteristics prevent the island in the Arabian Sea from being invaded by the Dark Legion. He rules the country with an iron fist, and holds the whole country together. he barely has enemies, and he doesn't believe much in Alliance either. Another thing you should know about him is: He doesn't tolerate betrayal, those who betrayed him would pay the price.

skills.title: Active Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from each unit, there is a chance to trigger 3 skill attacks, with each attack dealing 77.6% damage to 1 random enemy unit. If the attack occurs while defending a base, resource tile, or building, it applies 64.5% Debilitation to the target for 3 turns.

exclusiveSkill.name: Bell Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve the triggering chance of Bell's active skill by 46%.

bio: The war destroyed Bell's life, and she had no choice but to take revenge against the Dark Legion. She didn't have to go to the front line. because her hometown is the front line. A world where gender doesn't matter this beautiful lady killed 800 Dark Legion soldiers. With excellent tracking ability and sniper shooting skills. she never missed any enemy that appeared in the scope.

exclusiveSkill.name: Bellevue Skill

bio: Bellevue and her guerilla soldiers are the target of much hostility, and her works on military tactics are mostly ignored. General Mekirk of the Dark Empire, an Imperial Military Academy war artist, is one of the few who approves and likes Bellevue's work. To learn more, he even reached out to Bellevue to see if they had any records of real fights from the past that he might examine.

bio: Ben was raised by his mother. He was born in the sinful neighborhood of the Fallen City. Street bullying and fighting... that's what it's all about. Ben has become a fighter, and a threat to the gangs even though mom cautioned him to stay away from the gangs. Ben had to go against his mother's advice when she was caught and held as leverage. He had to save his mother and was thus framed and jailed. Years of jail life made him even tougher and stronger, just waiting for an opportunity to get his revenge. Shortly after leaving jail he was recruited by the "Raven" squad and performed well in his first operation called "Bear Hunt". He led the team well and got promoted to captain of the squad. Now, he is retired, he is free, and he is a member of the Men of Freedom.

bio: A devastating accident scarred the once-cheerful Binary, leaving her to hide behind her oversized hoodie, only to attract more unwanted attention. The fear turned into isolation until her talent caught the eye of hackers. Her fame grew with successful exploits, and her purple hoodie became iconic. The Free Alliance recruited her to strengthen their cybersecurity, where she helped develop the remote-controlled pulse device, Iron Hook, alongside Teresa.

skills.title: Preparation Skill

exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Bradley's skill effect by 46%. Improve the Damage Increase of the Army units by 40%.

bio: Over time, Bradley's armored corps rose to become the army's primary fighting unit and the empire's greatest rival. Therefore, the Empire not only ordered many assassination attempts against him, but also set the greatest possible reward on his head. The Freedom League headquarters takes the safety of this outstanding general seriously and often sends security to protect him.

bio: Brady is robust, brave, and has an exceptional field of view. His remarkable speed sets him apart, but what really makes him the best rival to Wade is how well he can guide rockets, earning him the title of "Manual Guidance." After joining the military, he utilized reverse engineering to assist Dr. Reichstein in developing decoy projectiles and upgrading thermal decoys for the air force.

bio: Before she could even bask in the glory of her sharpshooting championship, a devastating explosion turned Brynhildr's hometown into a smoky wasteland. That was the moment she decided to never turn away from a call to arms again. Armed with a vendetta and fueled by rage, she spent six months on the front lines making 200 enemies vanish through her sniper scope, earning her the fearsome title of "Queen Of Retribution." During a mission when she met a young boy who hauntingly reminded her of her lost brother, everything changed. Unable to continue with her duty, she abandoned her military post. These days, she lends her unparalleled skills to a civilian cause, showing up wherever she's needed to deliver her own brand of justice.

bio: The thugs lay sprawled, stunned—Carna had obliterated them with a single blow. But in that moment, she realized something within herself: a surge of raw strength and heightened reflexes. Eager to understand and refine this power, she enlisted in the army, seeking to hone her skills through battle. Rambo, having witnessed her might, became her biggest fan, and even Dr. Gero took a keen interest in her abilities. But for Carna, perhaps the true source of her power was the sense of control she gained from neutralizing threats.

bio: Cherno Alpha is the only Mark-1 Jaeger that has no escape pods. It is the ultimate symbol of strength and durability. Its silent, yet thunderous fighting style leaves a lasting impression on all who witness it. Despite its outdated technology, this Jaeger is far from easily defeated. With iron fists, Cherno Alpha delivers devastating blows that will make any Kaiju in the world of Top War tremble.

bio: After the collapse of Operation Green, Chloe and the Crimson Blade came under intense attack. Chloe drifted for a month in the ocean before she found a way to return to the alliance. After being submerged in salt water for a long time, Chloe's eyes were badly damaged. This made her eyes more sensitive and sometimes made her feel dizzy when exposed to certain light.

bio: Chris is a former Air Force pilot and a member of S.T.A.R.S. With extensive field experience, he’s highly skilled with knives, pistols, and even heavy weapons. He also excels in hand-to-hand combat. His unbreakable willpower gives him the edge in every battle.

bio: From throwing stones at birds to becoming an armed force member, Mathilda Cromwell mastered the astonishingly precise throwing talents she uses today. She was able to get inside the tank and strike back, holding back enemy forces until help arrived. Since then, the Freedom League has had a dedicated tank driver.

He was severely injured for resisting the invasion of the veteran, which forced him to join the Raven and perform operation "Bear Hunt". After completing the mission, he was transferred to the Allied Air Command as the Senior Military Officer.

After discovering that she has no family, he was determined to take Diana back to the base. He taught her about geography, basic world history, and the war. Extremely intelligent, little Diana has become a survival and combat expert in the wilderness.

bio: Erinyes Von Clauserich is from a prominent Imperial family. She has developed superior sailing and combat talents at a young age with the help of her grandpa, setting her apart from other noble girls. The leaders of the Empire held her family responsible for the failure of the Dark Navy and put them on trial in a military trial. Her grandpa later died of a terrible illness. She misses her grandfather, and the sound of the conch he gave her ignites her rage against the Empire. To combat the Dark Empire, she and her allies assembled a fleet. In light of this information, the Freedom League decided to keep Erinyes' fleet and family status the same and welcomed her and her fleet into their midst in the hopes that more of the Dark Legion Navy would abandon the battle and join them.

The 90s has made him one of the richest merchant dealers, but he made a vow to himself, never trade with the ungrateful and disloyal Dark Empire. Keeping that in mind, he joined the Freedom League.

Meanwhile, he created the super weapon lab and conducted a research on the 115# underground element - the Odinium.

For this reason, he refused to take the position in the Air Force Command, but continued to fight as a pilot on the front line instead.

bio: Heid is a meticulous officer and a strict adherent to military regulations, serving as the Army HQ's appointed Judge Advocate. His stern, unsmiling demeanor and perpetual frown tend to keep others at a distance. But this cold exterior belies a passionate heart; he tempers justice with pragmatism, refusing to enforce the letter of the law blindly. Unbeknownst to most, Heid leads a double life. He uses his official investigations as a cover to identify and recruit reliable talent for the most clandestine of missions. His fingerprints are all over covert operations like "Operation Bear Hunt" and the "Mutation Investigation".

bio:
Hiccup is the tenacious, spirited son of Stoick the Vast, chieftain of Berk. No longer a runt, but still lanky by comparison, Hiccup is the island’s ace flier and resident dragon expert.
Celebrated as a hometown hero for ushering in an era of peace between Vikings and dragons, Hiccup prefers to spend his time exploring uncharted lands and discovering new dragons with the help of his trusty Night Fury, Toothless. However, Stoick’s plan to pass down the mantle of Chief to his son has Hiccup fleeing in the opposite direction, for fear of becoming his father and losing sight of himself. But as the call of adventure draws Hiccup deep into lands unknown, his search for identity will be answered in ways he could never have dreamed.

Thus, Jester decided to embark on a journey to find it and grow stronger.

bio: For paratroopers, every drop behind enemy lines is a gamble with death. Swiftly crossing the final kilometers and descending to a safe altitude is key to minimizing casualties. Leveraging his extreme sports expertise, Jett formed the elite Nightwing Squad using special winged combat suits. Their outstanding performance made them Army legends. However, after an accident, Army HQ grounded the program, deeming it too risky. Fortunately, the Air Force was seeking to establish its own elite units. Jett seized the opportunity and transferred. In later missions, under the cover of darkness, he soared through the night, swiftly scanning and pinpointing enemy concentrations, proving his exceptional value.

However, unlike Nelle's self-reflection, Joan's departure was more of a subconscious choice amidst a rapidly changing world. Despite her extensive secretarial duties, her tactical and combat abilities should not be underestimated. Her brilliant performance in the group's combat training earned her the title "Sinking Star".

bio: Kotiya was raised in a tribe and learned hunting skills from her ancestors. Her father took her on a trip on a ship when she was old enough to visit a foreign nation. Something terrible occurred on the journey and Kotiya, as one of the few survivors, pledged to never stop trying to figure out what caused the tragedy. She was recommended to the Navy's Special Investigation Service because she was a great observer and could accurately predict how an opponent would think, which helped her plan strategies. Kotiya was finally able to start looking into what caused the shipwreck after a long wait.

bio: Adventure of Kumquat and Hazelnut: Throughout history, the residents of Ironstone Island have shown their strength and bravery. They've always wanted to be the first people to sail the seas and make a map of the whole world. Ironstone Island was secretly targeted by the Dark Empire because they believed its inhabitants were in possession of information that might lead them to greater power. In spite of the dominance of the Dark Forces, it is heartening to discover that cartographers and explorers continue their journeys to record new terrain. Kumquat and her friend Hazelnut, for example, have opted to abandon ship for the time being. They had the last piece of the map of the whole world with them. At this point, they were using hot air balloons to make maps for the Allies while operating under the cover of a sketching business.

He suffered severe hearing loss and eventually, he retired. Nevertheless, he found himself a job to train the newbies as an instructor. They call him "Sir Tinnitus"- try to imagine what would happen if you hear a big voice every day. Of course, he is still an excellent instructor.

She has been promoting her Air Force coordinated operations, which emphasizes on involving several combat aircrafts in the same operation. She is glamorous and arrogant, and she doesn't care much about others. But no one dared to despise her, which has been proven in combats.

bio: General Romer of the Dark Legion will spread rumors that will make people afraid before he attacks. This will cause a chaotic mass exodus of civilians and make it take longer to set up defenses. Nevertheless, in Olive Port, his plan completely failed. Layla made good use of the land around the port when she was stationed there to build defenses and obstacles. The Dark Legion's leading force had to run away when Layla's naval artillery caught them off guard. The navy opened fire as the soldiers ran, killing them all. After that, many citizens enlisted in the army to help protect the port. And thus, Layla became known as "the moon of Olive Port."

Lee Yewon took this opportunity to create armies to fight against the Dark Legion, and thus embarked on the journey of her salvation.

bio: When Lilia concentrates on tasks, her face easily flushes pink, which is why many call her “Pink Lily.” Although she excelled in her studies, Lilia was forcibly drafted into the Youth Group by the Empire before she could graduate. On the day she was supposed to report, she was delayed by her pet "Scratch" acting unusually and didn't arrive early. Along the way, she witnessed the Youth Group headquarters being obliterated by a massive bombing from the Freedom League. Subsequently, Bellevue found her details in documents intercepted from the Freedom League. Recognizing her calm, focused, and cautious qualities as perfect for a strategist, Bellevue persuaded her to join the Naval Academy as her deputy in training.

Despite the controversy, Lin's dynamic performances won over fellow recruits and impressed Tian Mu and Villiers, earning her the title of All-Rounder Fighter. Ironically, since her unit isn't on the front lines, her fans have criticized the military leadership.

When the poachers killed JJ's parents and were ready to capture JJ, Grandpa intervened and rescued him. That brings back memories of her youth, when she was in the same circumstances. Mei chose to study Kung Fu from her grandfather to protect the weak. Over time, JJ seems to have learnt Kung Fu while drinking, eating and being with Mei. During the investigation of Ahenarbe, the SaND agents encountered Mei. The Agents hoped these strong eastern powers would join the battle against the Dark Empire. In the end, Grandpa had to allow Mei and JJ to leave their home and join the military.

After being recruited by the Freedom League, to divert attention, a cute cat was added to the cockpit, and it has since been known as Meowzilla. Meowzilla has already attracted the attention of many: Wade, Bob, Pop, Dr. Gero, and pet lovers Violet, Tsuru, Serval, and Ben.

Knowing this, his superiors transferred him to the rear for his protection, assigning him to courier duties. Still, he yearned to fight, so he joined the Special Combat Division's Psychological Warfare Unit. On the Eastern Front, every soldier of the Dark Empire received surrender posters distributed by Mercury.

Amidst this, Nelle, profoundly impacted by her experiences, awakens to the deception. She abhors her own merciless nature but persists, driven by the primal instinct for survival.

bio: As a veteran of underwater operations, Anderson Nemo's pale skin does not match his fit body. He served as a commissioned officer in the Dark Legion fleet. Submarines under his command frequently attacked the Freedom League fleet and disrupted their supply lines in the early stages of the war. In those days, he was known as the Killer Whale. As the Freedom League's naval power developed quickly and the Empire's collapse was brought about by the Navy's overall incompetence, he progressively lost trust in the Dark Legion. He led his submarine crew to join the Freedom League. Because of Nemo's achievement, the Alliance's leadership is now focused on developing a robust submarine force. In light of his extensive expertise and professional skills, the Naval Academy appointed him as a temporary instructor for submarine troops.

Disturbed by this revelation, he chose to leave, while Pop remained. Years have passed, and even though the empire has since crumbled, Pop has ascended to the stature of a master mechanic.

This setting makes it easier to decide whether to grab Viper and fight or grab everything and leave when faced with danger. He has many enemies and has had to join a civil society organization called "SMG" for back up. This organisation however is cooperating with the Freedom League, thus Preycis has to pray that he doesn't encounter any of his old enemies.

Then, through Serval's introduction, she met Meowzilla, who custom-built "Meow"—a versatile smart vehicle—just for her. This special vehicle helped Sara overcome her insecurities, and with Meow by her side, she began to truly tap into her strengths, excelling in infiltration and ambush missions.

bio: Silence moves like a cat, she loves reading books on a peaceful afternoon, resting in her cozy living room, and she hates violence. She hates those hypocrites who advocate anti-war movements, while claiming that this is the war to end all wars. She believes that the man behind the organization should take responsibility for lives lost in the war. She received her first assassination mission from a little girl, who lost her mother during the conflict. Silence managed to sneak into the organization leader's office and ended his life. The Freedom League valued her assassination skill, and helped her escape from her pursuers. They sent a troop to escort her to the "SaND" for more missions and she has been working for "SaND" and eliminating her pursuers ever since.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Army units gain 50.0% HP Boost, which lasts for the entire battle. At the same time, the Army units in the first two rows gain 2 stacks of 20.0% Hostile, which lasts for the entire battle. The stack count is reset to the initial Hostile value at the beginning of each round.

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: When the Hostile effect is active, it triggers 1 skill attack, dealing 80.0% damage to the enemy unit with the lowest current HP percentage. If the target dies, your Army units gain a 15% Damage Increase, which lasts for the entire battle.

exclusiveSkill.name: Snake Eyes Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Snake Eyes' skill effect by 61% (without increasing the damage of counterattacks for Hostile)

milestones.text: When this hero participates in battle, the Attack of all units increases by 30%.
The Army units in the first two rows gain 38% HP Boost and the counterattack damage of this hero’s Hostile increases by 40%.
The Army units in the first two rows gain 1 Resistance effect. The counterattack damage of this hero’s Hostile increases by 40%.

bio: With unparalleled proficiency in various combat techniques and a wide arsenal of weapons, Snake Eyes is formidable. Yet, his most perilous attribute is not his weapons proficiency but his preference to incapacitate foes using swift and composed martial arts movements. In Top War, Snake Eyes is sure to enhance the combat capabilities of troops.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Army units in the first two rows gain a 40.0% HP Boost, which lasts for the entire battle. While on the defensive, this effect is further enhanced by 25.0%. Additionally, the first two rows of your units receive a 60.0% Decreased Damage Taken for 2 rounds.

skills.title: Active Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from each Army unit in the first two rows, there is a chance to trigger 1-3 skill attacks that randomly deal 120.0% damage to 1 enemy unit in the current back two rows each time.

exclusiveSkill.name: Springfield Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Springfield's skill effect by 61% (without increasing the triggering chance of the active skill)

milestones.text: When this hero participates in battle, the Attack of all units increases by 10%.
There's a chance to trigger the hero's active skill after regular attacks by any one of your Army units, the skill damage +21%.
The active skill of this hero is changed to perform 2-4 attacks.

bio: One of Springfield's few memories of his grandfather, a hunter, is of him teaching him how to be calm and focused in the snow when he was a kid. After he joined the army, he became a well-known sniper. But he was forced to quit the reconnaissance team since he couldn't complete the mission - snipe the "shadow." Afterwards, he resumed his military service as a heavy fire support specialist. With the anti-material rifle, which has a huge effective range and a lot of power, he was able to get his confidence back.

skills.title: Active Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from each unit, there is a chance to trigger 4 skill attacks. If the skill is triggered by an Air Force unit, it adds an additional skill attack. Each skill attack randomly deals 39.9% damage to 1 enemy unit and has a chance to apply 1 stack of 25.0% Vulnerable to the hit target.

bio: Starscream often refers to himself as the Decepticon's deputy leader. He thinks he's just as good at strategy and warfare as Megatron, and he often goes against orders to prove it. It's no surprise that in Top War, Starscream converts into a domineering red and blue fighter jet.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Naval units gain 70.0% HP Boost, which lasts for the entire battle. They also gain 1 stack(s) of 50% Light Armor at the start of each round.

skills.title: Active Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from your Naval units, there is a chance to trigger 3 skill attacks. Each attack randomly deals 90.0% damage to 1 enemy unit, and deals 40% Splash damage to all other units in the same column. Each type of Damage Reduction Shield boosts Splash damage by 20% (up to 240%).

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: For each type of Damage Reduction Shield on your Naval units, boosts Decreased DMG Taken by 15%, up to 240%. If there are more than 2 types of Damage Reduction Shield, each additional type deals Splash damage to trigger 1 extra time on the main target.

exclusiveSkill.name: Stoick Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Stoick's skill effect by 61% (without increasing the Decreased DMG Taken effect of Light Armor Splash and the skill triggering chance)

milestones.text: When this hero participates in battle, Attack of all your units increases by 30%.

Increases the stacks of Light Armor gained from this hero's Preparation Skill to 2. When there are more than 2 types of Damage Reduction Shield, Splash damage also affects all other units in the same row.
Boosts Decreased DMG Taken granted by this hero's passive per type of Damage Reduction Shield to 60%. Additionally, each type of Damage Reduction Shield increases this hero's Splash damage by 40%.

bio:
Stoick is the mythic and mighty Chieftain of Berk – a great, shaggy mountain of a man whose conquests have become the stuff of Viking legend.
A reformed dragon fighter, Stoick’s job as protector of the people is decidedly lighter since Hiccup ushered in an era of peace. Boastful and gregarious, Stoick is now the proudest father in Berk, forever singing Hiccup’s praises, even as his absentee son is off mapping the world instead of showing up for work. But when Stoick’s plan to retire and anoint Hiccup chief is disrupted by rumblings of a terrible foe’s return, Stoick wastes no time in breaking out the old armor and charging off to defend what is his.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Air Force units receive 40.0% Indestructible, which lasts for 1 round, as well as 25.0% Vitality, lasting for 3 rounds.

skills.title: Active Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from each Air Force unit, there is a chance to trigger 2 skill attacks that randomly deal 155.0% damage to 1 enemy unit each time.

exclusiveSkill.name: Storm Shadow Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Storm Shadow's skill effect by 61% (without increasing the triggering chance of the active skill and the Vitality effect)

milestones.text: When this hero participates in battle, the Attack of all units increases by 30%.
This hero’s Indestructible effect is extended by 1 rounds. At the start of each round, 3 enemy units receive the 50% Ignition effect.
The Indestructible effect of this hero is boosted by 10%, and the Attack of the active skill +2 times.

bio: Born into an assassin family, Storm Shadow bonded deeply with Snake Eyes through intense ninja training. If you're looking for a greater challenge than Snake Eyes' sessions, enroll in Storm Shadow's training courses - he'll push your limits.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, all your units gain a 38.0% Indestructible, which lasts for 1 round. The units in the third row gain a 40.0% Support, providing Support to units in the same column, which lasts for the entire battle.

skills.title: Active Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from each unit in the first two rows, there is a chance to trigger 2 skill attacks that randomly deal 150.0% damage to 1 enemy unit in the current back two rows each time.

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: When the units in the third row activate Support, the shared damage taken is reduced by 40%.

exclusiveSkill.name: Striker Eureka Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Striker Eureka's skill effect by 61% (without increasing the triggering chance of the active skill, the effect of Support, and the shared damage reduction)

milestones.text: When this hero participates in battle, increase the HP for all units by 30%.
The duration of the Indestructible effect of this hero is extended by 1 round(s), and your units in the third row gain 40% HP Boost.
The number of attacks for the active skill of this hero is increased by 2, and when Support, the shared damage reduction is 60%.

bio: True to its designation, the Mark-5 Jaeger, Striker Eureka, possesses lightning-fast mobility, delivering swift and unrestricted blows to its enemies. Its unpredictable approach to combat has earned it the highest kill count among all Jaegers. Striker Eureka's formidable and deadly assaults leave no room for survival for Kaiju in the Top War world.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Naval units receive a 70.0% Attack Enhancement, which lasts for the entire battle. Additionally, the naval units in your back two rows gain a 30.0% Attack Enhancement, also lasting for the entire battle. Your naval units receive a 10.0% Silent Precision, for the entire battle.

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: When your naval units have the Damage Reduction Shield, each type of Damage Reduction Shield grants 10% Damage Increase, up to 200%. At the start of each round, randomly apply Silence effect to 2 enemy units in the first two rows, lasting for 1 turn.

exclusiveSkill.name: Stromoy Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Stromoy's skill effect by 61% (without increasing the number of turns Silence lasts and the affected unit quantity, and the Silent Precision effect)

milestones.text: When this hero participates in battle, the Attack of all units increases by 30%.
The Silent Precision of this hero is increased to 25%. At the beginning of each round, your Naval units gain 1 stack of 40% Heavy Armor.
The Silent Precision of this hero is increased to 50%. +1 Silence targets.

bio: Stromoy comes from a family of musicians along the Southwest Coast, where her talent and training quickly earned her recognition. However, she soon grew tired of the predictable routine and sought out a more thrilling and adventurous pursuit. That's when she discovered the world of powerboat racing, which ignited her passion like never before. During her journey with Villiers, Stromoy learned about the formation of a special combat force within the Navy Headquarters. Intrigued by the opportunity to push her skills to the limit, she made the bold decision to join the Navy as the lead motorboat driver for the "Torrent" operation team.

skills.title: Active Skill
skills.description: When each of your Naval units performs a regular attack, there is a chance to apply 91.4% Debilitation to the hit targets, lasting for 2 turns.

exclusiveSkill.name: Teresa Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Teresa's skill effect by 46%.

bio: When Reichstein was giving a lecture at Teresa's university, he was attracted by this young lady's theory. Later, he invited Teresa to join his research. Teresa began to develop her talent and became an expert in naval weapons, leading the research and development of the "Siren" torpedo - an excellent weapon that delivers an incredible amount of explosive power.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Air Force units in the first row receive 100.0% HP Boost, which lasts for the entire battle.

skills.title: Active Skill
skills.description: When the back two rows of your Air Force units perform regular attacks, they gain 20.0% Damage Increase.

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: The skill damage received by your Air Force units in the first row is reduced by 50.0%.

exclusiveSkill.name: Tian Mu Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Tian Mu's skill effect by 46%. When fighting against Air Force, improve the Damage Increase of the Air Force by 40%.

bio: Tian Mu and Villiers became good friends during the "Night Fall" campaign's after-party. Tian Mu spends his free time following Villiers about on her concert tour, and he's quickly amassed a dedicated fan base that knows just where to find him.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Air Force units receive 125.0% Attack Enhancement, which lasts for the entire battle. The Air Force units in the first two rows gain 1 stack(s) of 50.0% Taunt, obtained at the start of each of the first 2 rounds.

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: When your Air Force units gain Taunt, they get 1 stack(s) each time, improving Damage Increase by 50.0% up to a max of 200%. Taunt remains effective even when activated. When attacked, units with Taunt trigger 1 stack(s) of Taunt, reducing the damage by 50.0% and having a 50% chance to apply 50% Ignition to 3 random enemy units.

exclusiveSkill.name: Tigress Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Tigress' skill effect by 61% (without increasing all effects related to Taunt)

milestones.text: When this hero participates in battle, the Attack of all units increases by 30%.

When this hero participates in battle, at the start of each round, apply 50% Ignition to 3 random enemies. The Taunt effect originally for your first 2 row Air Force units is now given to all Air Force units, obtained at the start of each of the first 2 rounds.
During the first 2 rounds, each time Taunt is gained, the stacks increase by 1. Moreover, your first 2 rows of Air Force units get an extra 30% Attack Enhancement effect.

bio: Tigress is the strongest and boldest of the Furious Five. She's everything you'd want in a hero: over-achieving, brave and fearless. She'd do anything to save the day. Underneath her stoic, iron-jawed exterior is a warm compassion that others seldom see.

skills.title: Rage Skill
skills.description: When the rage skill is released, consuming 7 Rage points, it triggers a skill attack that deals 51.4% damage to each enemy unit. If the target has the Debilitation effect, the damage is increased by 70.0%.

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from each unit, gain 1 Rage point.

exclusiveSkill.name: Tsuru Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Tsuru's skill effect by 46%.

bio: Tsuru's family is the guardian of the Shinto shrine in a hidden village. When she was a little girl, she found herself a little bit different from those of her age: she's smarter, stronger and inspiring. Some even believe she has supernatural powers. She soon became the leader of the village after she grew up, and with her knowledge and tactics, this “Shrine Maiden” managed to defend their home against the Dark Legion for almost 3 months. The Freedom League helped them and eliminated those invaders. While many has tried to invite her to the League, she insists to guard her hometown.

skills.title: Active Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from each Army unit, there is a chance to trigger 1 skill attack. It deals 117.4% damage to the target that was hit by the regular attack.

exclusiveSkill.name: Tywin Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve the triggering chance of Tywin's active skill by 46%, increase gathering speed on the World Map by 60%.

bio: General Tywin served as the commander of the Artillery of the Freedom League. He loves to use cannon in battle and could handle that well, supplemented by infantry and motorized troops for coordinated operations. In the early days, his army was an important force against the Dark Legion. Tywin cooperated closely with Marines, and he trusts Captain Rambo as a partner that he can always count on.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round, your Navy units gain 110.0% Attack Enhancement, which lasts for the entire battle. Your Navy units also gain 35% Concentration effect, capped at 280%, lasting for the entire battle. At the beginning of each round, your Navy units gain 2 stacks of 50% Heavy Armor effect.

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: Each time Damage Reduction Shield reduces damage taken and consumes a stack, all units get an extra 10% Decreased Damage Taken, capped at 80%. All heroes' Splash damage will deal damage to the main target an additional 1 time(s).

exclusiveSkill.name: Valka Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Valka's Skill effect by 61% (without increasing the Concentration, Heavy Armor effects, or Splash's additional damage to the main target).

milestones.text: When this hero participates in battle, Attack of all your units increases by 30%.
This hero's Concentration effect is increased to 70%. When this hero participates in battle, all Splash damage is increased by 16%.

When this hero's Heavy Armor effect is about to disappear, there is a chance that the stack will not be consumed after being triggered. When this hero participates in battle, all Splash damage is increased by 30%.

bio: Valka is Hiccup's long-lost mother and Stoick's wife who was abducted in a dragon attack twenty years ago. Always an advocate of peace between dragons and Vikings, Valka has since lived among dragons, learned their ways, discovered their secrets, and become their fierce protector. She is strong and uncompromising, but at her core still possesses the overwhelming love of a wife and mother.

skills.title: Pre-battle Active Skill
skills.description: Grant 22.2% Rainbow Wave to the commander when manually using this skill. It lasts for 10 minutes and can be used a maximum of 5 times per day.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, all units receive 73.4% Attack Enhancement, which lasts for the entire battle.

exclusiveSkill.name: Villiers Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Villiers' skill effect by 61%.

bio: Jane Villiers was born with a pair of heterochromatic eyes, so she was abandoned by her parents and everyone in her village treated her like a jinx. The poor little girl was adopted by the Duke of Buckingham, and the Duke treated her as his own family. With great efforts, she finally became a famous singer. During the war, the Duke of Buckingham participated in the Great Landing Campaign. Jane always visits her father to check up on him and all the soldiers love her encouraging song. "Her song sounds like a rainbow!!" a soldier said. And many soldiers even believe that anyone she kisses will be blessed with winning in the coming battles.

skills.title: Active Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from each Naval units, there is a chance to trigger 1 skill attack. It deals 112.5% damage to each unit in the enemy's current first row.

exclusiveSkill.name: Violet Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve the triggering chance of Violet's active skill by 46%.

bio: Violet loves competitions. She is a challenger that desires to compete with you in everything, she even chews her gum for longer durations than everyone else, I mean literally, she is holding the record for chewing gum the longest. She is very popular in the Freedom League as she always kill more enemies. With the help of Teresa, she developed a magnetic rubber bomb.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Air Force units receive 40.0% Indestructible, which lasts for 1 round(s).

skills.title: Active Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from each Air Force unit, there is a chance to trigger 3 skill attacks. Prioritizes enemies not affected by Ignition, dealing 100.0% damage per attack and applying a 15% Ignition effect to the target. If the target already has Ignition, the skill deals an extra 10% skill damage.

exclusiveSkill.name: Vivian Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Vivian's skill effect by 61% (without increasing the triggering chance of the active skill, the effect of Ignition, and the damage increase effect).

milestones.text: When this hero participates in battle, the Attack of all units increases by 30%.
The duration of the Indestructible effect of this hero is extended by 1 round(s), in the first round, your Air Force units gain 35% Vitality effect for 2 round(s).
This hero’s Indestructible effect is increased by 10%, active skill attack count is increased by 1, and active skill damage is increased by 100%.

bio: Vivian and Cromwell served in logistics early in their careers. Vivian's bright and optimistic personality earned her admiration from her peers. After transferring to the Air Force, she led with precision during an Imperial raid, coordinating the relocation of aircraft and leading air defenses to down several enemy planes, pushing back the invaders. Witnesses described the sky as being filled with crimson smoke and fire from the explosions. Since meeting Kotiya at the academy, Vivian has eagerly joined her in exploring mysterious phenomena.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Naval units gain 20.2% Indestructible, lasting for 1 round. At the same time, the hero gains 1-6 Rage points.

skills.title: Rage Skill
skills.description: When the rage skill is released, it consumes 7 Rage points and deals 40.5% damage to all enemy units. If a Naval unit triggers this skill, it applies 20.2% Debilitation to the hit targets, which lasts for 1 turn. After releasing the skill, the hero's Rage increases by 1-6 points.

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from each unit, gain 1 Rage point.

exclusiveSkill.name: Yuu Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Yuu's skill effect by 61%.

milestones.text: When this hero participates in battle, the HP of Naval units increases by 30%.
Regardless of whether this hero is in battle or not, the Damage Increase of all units will increase by 3%.
When this hero participates in battle, your Naval units get 15% Damage Increase, and the hero's active skill gains a minimum of 3 points when gaining Rage.

bio: Yuu's family is a small branch of a wealthy Japanese family. She was very cautious about committing herself to anything. Years have passed, and the family's glory has gone. Iris has the emblem of her family and can't stop gazing at it. One day, she walked into a club and just like that, she felt in control of herself again, and her enthusiasm for life was revived. Club "Hand Of Fate" has since been established. Anything useful to Yuu is a bet, whether it's knowledge or a secret.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Naval units receive 65.0% HP Boost, which lasts for the entire battle.

skills.title: Active Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from each Navy unit, there is a chance to trigger 3 skill attacks. Each skill attack randomly deals 130.0% damage to 1 unit. If the hit target has the Abnormal Status effect, it increases the damage by 10%.

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from each Naval unit, there is a chance to apply 1 stack of 15.0% Vulnerable effect to 2 enemy units.

exclusiveSkill.name: Zhen Skill
exclusiveSkill.description: Improve Zhen's skill effect by 61% (without improving the triggering chance of the active skill or the damage boost effect against targets with Abnormal Status).

milestones.text: When this hero participates in battle, the Attack of all units increases by 30%.
If the target of the active skill has Abnormal Status, then increase the skill damage by 20%. Enemy units affected by the passive skill with Vulnerable effect are increased to 3
If the target of the active skill has Abnormal Status, then increase the skill damage by 20%. The active skill attack is increased by 2 times.

bio: Zhen honed her survival skills in the mean streets and is always two steps ahead of everyone else. She is tough, scrappy and very clever. If you meet her, you'd better secure your pockets before admiring Zhen's agile fighting skills.

skills.title: Active Skill
skills.description: After every regular attack from each unit, there is a chance to trigger 3 skill attacks that randomly deal 33.9% damage to 1 enemy unit each time. If the target unit is affected by Dark Force Unit, the attacks are guaranteed to trigger critical hits.

bio: Bumblebee is the youngest member and one of the last recruits to the Autobots team. An exuberant and energetic adventurer, his delightful charm and optimism welcomes everyone he meets. He looks up to Optimus Prime as a father figure and is wholeheartedly devoted to his leader's mission to secure freedom for all sentient beings. In Top War, Bumblebee converts into a small car, capable of great speed and endurance during vehicle combat!

skills.title: Domestic Skill
skills.description: This hero's gathering speed on the World Map +18.5%. The gathering speed of Odinium on the World Map is increased by 27.7%.

bio: Marie Delhuyar's father is a well-known mineralogist in the Freedom League. A dedicated scholar who has been working away from home for a long time. Marie grew up without love and attention and gave up her chance to go to college choosing to join the army instead. She wanted to find out why her father was so obsessed with those stones. The same year, Marie's father discovered the existence of Odinium. He was exposed to a lot of radiation, which caused him to get ARS. After realizing the importance of her father's finding, Marie continued her father's studies on Odinium.

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: After each Air Force unit's HP drops below 50%, they gain a 20.5% Crit. Rate and Crit. Damage bonus.

bio: Dr. Gero is passionate about the human body. In order to prove his theory, he designed many incredible artificial organs. The craziest thing is that he had his brain transplanted. He is insane. There's a fine line between genius and insanity, and Dr. Gero has erased it. Well, to be fair, his technique has really saved many officers.

skills.title: Holding In Stock
skills.description: After obtaining the hero, the 2.0% Heart effect is activated.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, all units receive a 23.7% HP Boost, which lasts for the entire battle.

skills.title: Domestic Skill
skills.description: This hero's gathering speed on the World Map +11.2%.

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: After each Naval unit takes damage, they gain 1 stack of 10.9% Decreased Damage Taken, which can stack up to 3 times.

bio: The warship is losing its position in the war, but this silent man never gave up on his beloved ship. Hammer was born on a warship, and warship means the world to him. He is good at using the armor of ships to effectively reduce the damage. He's the strongest shield in "The Three Admirals".

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, all units receive a 22.1% HP Boost, which lasts for the entire battle.

skills.title: Domestic Skill
skills.description: This hero's gathering speed on the World Map +18.1%.

bio: As a veteran in the Freedom League, Ishi Tarou has long been tired of the endless fighting. He set himself a slogan - you are right where you should be. Ishi Tarou, who has experienced many battles, is proud that he's never had an accident. When the Freedom League needed a mining expert, Ishi Tarou used his extensive knowledge of mining exploration, and volunteered to join the mining squad. Away from the frontline.

skills.title: Domestic Skill
skills.description: This hero's gathering speed on the World Map +26.3%.

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: When this hero is on the defensive during gathering on the World Map, all your units gain a 29.9% attack speed.

bio: Kate Curry would do whatever it takes to find the latest breaking news, literally, she is willing to go to the front lines. She has become a famous frontline reporter with politicians and business leaders also willing to accept her interviews. In order to be more objective in her reports, Kate Curry insists on maintaining a neutral and unbiased style. Having said that, there are rumors that she is working for the intelligence agency of the Freedom League now.

skills.title: Passive Skill
skills.description: The regular attacks launched by your Army units cannot be dodged.

bio: Rambo is the captain of the Brotherhood Army, and he is an experienced combat elite, the best of the best. In the great landing operation, Brotherhood, as one of the first strike forces, he attacked on the rear and destroyed many 88mm Flak and saved more soldiers. Rambo infiltrated the enemy's camp, eliminated a couple of enemies without firing a shot and returned to the base.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Army units receive 24.3% Dodge rate, which lasts for the entire battle.

bio: Reichstein, or the Molecular Shield, is known as a material scientist who developed the polymer armor. Many have forgotten that he was an architect - he is the designer of layered trenches as well. Of course, he is also a nice professor and has been helping many newcomers over the past years. Recently, he is fascinated by the newly discovered element 115#.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Air Force units receive 25.3% Critical Rate increase, which lasts for the entire battle.

bio: Ricardo wouldn't take off the mask even after landing, and his neurotic and crazy personality made him disconnected from other people. Perhaps it was just a coincidence, Ricardo invented a remote-controlled bomb: using a monitor to adjust the location of the bomb and kill units more accurately. Somehow Ricardo regards Tianmu as his role model.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Naval units receive 32.8% Attack Enhancement, which lasts for the entire battle.

bio: Simon enjoys spending time with Naval fleet, and he is the best gunnery officer. And to keep fit, he never skips daily exercise (even leg day exercises). He wrote a book about "NO-EQUIPMENT WORKOUT", which became a best seller in the Freedom League. He is the best attacker in "The Three Admirals".

skills.title: Domestic Skill
skills.description: Every day, the first 50.0 regular units receive free fast repair.

bio: They call Wade the mechanical maniac. Before he joined the League, "Touchdown" was the superstar member of another League - the Rugby League. When the war was on, "Touchdown" took the lead and joined the army. It didn't take too long for the general to notice Wade's talent and passion for machines, so now he is working at the Repair Station, a perfect place for him to get his job done.

skills.title: Opening Skill
skills.description: The hero randomly launches 2 skill attacks against one enemy unit, each dealing 35.1% damage.

skills.title: Domestic Skill
skills.description: This hero's gathering speed on the World Map +17.2%.

bio: She is an excellent agent, maybe you have heard her name, Natasha. But that is just a name. As a teenager, she was selected by the "Shadowscale" to train on the secret base "SaND (Security and National Defence)", away from her beloved family. She grew up into a beautiful woman, like a snowflake, pretty but cold. She has taken countless lives while completing tasks. The Black Widow has become her new name.

skills.title: Domestic Skill
skills.description: During attacks on Dark Force Unit, the marching speed of your queue +14.4%.

bio: Bob joined the army because he watched a public service advertisement. He merely qualified physical tests, so that's why now he is here in the logistics support team. He is also a people pleaser, which made him popular among officers, and also gained him praise and trust.

skills.title: Preparation Skill
skills.description: In the first round of battle, your Air Force units receive 11.8% Attack Enhancement, which lasts for the entire battle.

bio: O'Neill is a member of the Union Air Force Special Forces, and is the first female special force member in the Freedom League. In the all-men troop, she always has to work harder to prove herself. However, it didn't take very long for O'Neill to change their attitude: she aced all her physical tests and defeated all opponents in close combat.
